'''bosavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberiferous|tuberiferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberiferous|tuberiferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bosavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosavithi|bosavithi]] || [[word:bosaviji|bosaviji]] || [[word:bosavishi|bosavishi]] || [[word:bosaviki|bosaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosavuthuthu|bosavuthuthu]] || [[word:bosavujuju|bosavujuju]] || [[word:bosavushushu|bosavushushu]] || [[word:bosavukuku|bosavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosavuthu|bosavuthu]] || [[word:bosavuju|bosavuju]] || [[word:bosavushu|bosavushu]] || [[word:bosavuku|bosavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosavufthuf|bosavufthuf]] || [[word:bosavufjuf|bosavufjuf]] || [[word:bosavufshuf|bosavufshuf]] || [[word:bosavufkuf|bosavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosavethe|bosavethe]] || [[word:bosaveje|bosaveje]] || [[word:bosaveshe|bosaveshe]] || [[word:bosaveke|bosaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosavothotho|bosavothotho]] || [[word:bosavojojo|bosavojojo]] || [[word:bosavoshosho|bosavoshosho]] || [[word:bosavokoko|bosavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosavotho|bosavotho]] || [[word:bosavojo|bosavojo]] || [[word:bosavosho|bosavosho]] || [[word:bosavoko|bosavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosavofthof|bosavofthof]] || [[word:bosavofjof|bosavofjof]] || [[word:bosavofshof|bosavofshof]] || [[word:bosavofkof|bosavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfthÃŸf|bosavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfjÃŸf|bosavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfshÃŸf|bosavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfkÃŸf|bosavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bosavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bosavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bosavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bosavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfthÃŸf|bosavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfjÃŸf|bosavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfshÃŸf|bosavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfkÃŸf|bosavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfthÃŸf|bosavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfjÃŸf|bosavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfshÃŸf|bosavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bosavÃŸfkÃŸf|bosavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosavÃḊthÃḊ|bosavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bosavÃḊjÃḊ|bosavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bosavÃḊshÃḊ|bosavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bosavÃḊkÃḊ|bosavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosavathatha|bosavathatha]] || [[word:bosavajaja|bosavajaja]] || [[word:bosavashasha|bosavashasha]] || [[word:bosavakaka|bosavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosavatha|bosavatha]] || [[word:bosavaja|bosavaja]] || [[word:bosavasha|bosavasha]] || [[word:bosavaka|bosavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosavafthaf|bosavafthaf]] || [[word:bosavafjaf|bosavafjaf]] || [[word:bosavafshaf|bosavafshaf]] || [[word:bosavafkaf|bosavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bosavasha|bosavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosavshÃḋsha|bosavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosavrosha|bosavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosavmusha|bosavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosavyasha|bosavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosavnkshÃḋsha|gobosavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosavnkrosha|gobosavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosavnkmusha|gobosavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosavnkyasha|gobosavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bosasavasha|bosasavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosasavshÃḋsha|bosasavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosasavrosha|bosasavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosasavmusha|bosasavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosasavyasha|bosasavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosasavnkshÃḋsha|gobosasavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosasavnkrosha|gobosasavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosasavnkmusha|gobosasavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosasavnkyasha|gobosasavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:besÃḊvasha|besÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:besÃḊvshÃḋsha|besÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:besÃḊvrosha|besÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:besÃḊvmusha|besÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:besÃḊvyasha|besÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobesÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gobesÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobesÃḊvnkrosha|gobesÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobesÃḊvnkmusha|gobesÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobesÃḊvnkyasha|gobesÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bosfavasha|bosfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosfavshÃḋsha|bosfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosfavrosha|bosfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosfavmusha|bosfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosfavyasha|bosfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosfavnkshÃḋsha|gobosfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosfavnkrosha|gobosfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosfavnkmusha|gobosfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosfavnkyasha|gobosfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
